basic_details.job_title: RMC Ex Servicemen Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 69 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajkot Municipal Corporation (RMC) Ex Servicemen Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of RMC. A total of 69 vacancies have been announced through the RMC Ex Servicemen Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired Army / Navy / Air Force personnel (up to Havildar rank) with Medical Category SHAPE-1 (S.H.A.P.E.-1)
qualification.details: Retired Army / Navy / Air Force personnel (up to Havildar rank) with Medical Category SHAPE-1 (S.H.A.P.E.-1).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for RMC Ex-Servicemen Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Ex-Servicemen posts at Rajkot Municipal Corporation is scheduled for 22 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Ex-Servicemen posts in RMC?
faq.answer: Rajkot Municipal Corporation is recruiting for a total of 69 vacancies for the Ex-Servicemen posts. This is a significant opportunity for eligible retired personnel.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Ex-Servicemen posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired Army, Navy, or Air Force personnel, up to the rank of Havildar, and must have a Medical Category SHAPE-1 (S.H.A.P.E.-1).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Ex-Servicemen posts is 45 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Ex-Servicemen positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Ex-Servicemen posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this walk-in recruitment drive by RMC.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the RMC Ex-Servicemen recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Ex-Servicemen positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Ex-Servicemen posts in Rajkot Municipal Corporation is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply for the RMC Ex-Servicemen recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and details for the walk-in can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. The official website is also provided for further information.
